channel.title: Lakefront Leak and Drain Content Pipe
channel.description: Automated Plumbing Leads for Cleveland and Cuyahoga County

item.title: Spring Showers Bring Sewer Scares: Protecting Your Cleveland Home
item.description: As Cleveland's spring showers arrive, be aware that heavy rainfall can stress our city's aging sewer infrastructure, increasing the risk of basement backups. To proactively protect your home, consider having a professional inspect your sewer line and, if suitable, install a backwater valve.

item.title: Cleveland's Big Chill: Winter Pipe Protection
item.description: Cleveland residents, prepare for the Big Chill by insulating any exposed pipes, especially those in unheated areas like basements and crawl spaces. This crucial step prevents freezing and potential bursts, keeping your home's plumbing safe and sound throughout the winter.
